title: Without You
why_this_song: Without You by Mariah Carey (1993) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 25 times; first heard in: "No, I can't forget this evening"
Appears 17 times; first heard in: "I can't live, if living is without you"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I can't live, if living is without you"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I can't live, if living is without you"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I can't live, I can't give any more"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Or your face as you were leaving
But I guess that's just the way the story goes
You always smile, but in your eyes your sorrow shows
When I think of all my sorrow
When I had you there, but then I let you go

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "can't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "can't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "live" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: No, I can't forget this evening
I can't live, if living is without you

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Without You" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Without You" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Without You" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Without You", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Without You" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Without You" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
